## What this PR changes

- [ ] New case submission (`cases/`)
- [ ] Rule change (requires PRD + ACCEPTANCE version bump)
- [ ] Install kit update (`for-coders/`)
- [ ] Documentation update (`docs/`)
- [ ] Tool-specific adaptation

## Checklist

- [ ] If a rule changed: PRD_v*.md and ACCEPTANCE_v*.md both updated with matching version number
- [ ] If a new case: used `cases/TEMPLATE.md` as the starting point
- [ ] If the install kit changed: `for-coders/install.sh` tested on a clean environment
- [ ] No rules added without a supporting case

## Supporting case (if applicable)

What real project failure or success motivates this change?
